name: Entity Head Look
desc: Updates an entity's head yaw rotation independently of body rotation.
notes: Head yaw is separate from body yaw — entities can look in a different direction than they're moving. Used by Backtrack modules to track the full entity rotation, and by ESP modules for accurate head-position aim prediction.

implementation.overview: S19PacketEntityHeadLook updates the head yaw of an entity, separate from the body yaw (which comes via S16/S17/S18). This matters for aim prediction — the head can be turned 360° while the body faces forward. Aqua 13 Backtrack captures S19 alongside S14/S18 to maintain full entity rotation history.

modules.name: Backtrack Head Tracking (Aqua 13)
modules.purpose: Track S19 head look alongside S14 entity movement to maintain full rotation history for backtrack hit registration.
